description: Terminal state returned by the update-linkedin-profile skill after operator review and optional write.

status.description: Terminal state: success = approved diff written, failure = halted before write, awaiting_lgtm = draft presented, no write yet

section.description: The linkedin_master.ts section targeted by this skill execution

entry_target.description: Company name string when section=experience; null for about and tagline sections

file_written.description: Absolute path to linkedin_master.ts if and only if an approved write occurred; null otherwise

halt_reason.description: Assertion ID and human-readable reason if skill halted before write (FA-01 through FA-04)

notes.description: Optional: warnings, follow-up items, or operator action required

validation_note: status=success requires file_written to be non-null and resolve to an existing file. status=failure requires halt_reason to be non-null. awaiting_lgtm is an intermediate state only — the skill must not terminate permanently in this state; it must yield and wait for operator response.
